title: Lobby Capture Simulator: Strategic Channel Substitution in Regulatory Capture
description: Versioned simulator, source snapshots, validation reports, generated manuscript tables and figures, and Wiley-oriented submission package for an agent-based mechanism model of lobbying, regulatory capture, channel substitution, and anti-capture reform design.
notes: Private credentials and raw API payload archives are excluded. Normalized public-data snapshots, source-status manifests, report CSVs, validation summaries, generated tables, generated figure sources, and manuscript source are included in the repository and release artifacts.
